composition.important_crop_information: cab and grille fully within frame, trailer fully visible, no major vertical/horizontal cuts

company_identity.appearance: large bold white capitals against dark background

company_identity.position: across cab door and above side window, horizontal
on trailer side, within globe logo, horizontal

owner_signatures.position: inside the cab, lower left area of windshield (from viewer's perspective)
front cab right side grille region (from viewer's perspective)

roof_lights.position: on roof above windshield in horizontal row

grille_lights.position: integrated into grille, 2 per upper three black horizontal bars

bumper_lights.position: far left and far right of bumper

main_headlights.position: far left and right, integrated in cab corners above bumper

front_geometry.grille_description: Four thick black horizontal bars with chrome accent edges; three upper bars have integrated orange grille lights
front_geometry.headlight_description: Two main units, stacked layout including turn indicators and daytime running lights, rectangular and wrap round to side
front_geometry.bumper_description: Black/silver, with fog/driving lights at each end, flush surface, lower edge cut for aerodynamic fairing
